keyWarnings: STAT 202 must be completed with at least a C before upper-level required finance courses.
Core math and statistics should be completed before major finance coursework.
ACCT 321 and ACCT 322 are strongly recommended as free electives for finance students.
Business flexible requirements can be taken in different sequences, but prerequisite awareness still matters.
samplePlanSignals: STAT 202 and FIN 301 should be completed before upper-level finance sequence starts.
FIN 302, FIN 321, and FIN 325 are anchor finance requirements and should not be delayed.
Upper-level electives shape specialization in investments, fintech, M&A, portfolio management, wealth management, and credit.
mvpRecommendationRules: Flag students who have not completed STAT 202 before trying to plan upper-level finance coursework.
Recommend ACCT 321/322 if a student is serious about deeper finance / valuation roles.
Surface fintech, portfolio, or wealth-management electives based on career goals.
Push internship / co-op planning early because finance recruiting can happen before students feel ready.
